idea: mma.commit after inner K-loop: primitive not supported on SM86 CuTe backend (Hopper-only)
Direct mma.store to global memory: removed output_s shared buffer (1KB), eliminated block-level dma.copy barrier. SM92 compute_bound 92% → 3.27x speedup to new best 0.503 TFLOPS
TILE_K=16 on directstore: 0.379 TFLOPS — less arithmetic intensity without occupancy gain (still 255 regs)
swiz<128> on directstore base: 0.502 TFLOPS — marginal delta from best 0.503. Bank conflicts not binding constraint on directstore path.
TILE_K=64 on directstore: 0.088 TFLOPS catastrophic regression. TILE_K=48 crashed (illegal mem access, 4096/48 non-integer). TILE_K=64 causes register spills regardless of output path.
4-warp block TILE_M=32/TILE_N=32 with sync dma.copy: 0.101 TFLOPS regression. Async copy with 4 warps causes 4x redundant copies. Sync copy avoids redundancy but is slower.
